name: Ms. Lynch
description:
(CW: Vore)

(Char. by Lampton) Ms. Lynch prides herself in having not only the most respectful class in school, but also the most dreaded one by students. The reason for that is simple: any misbehavior or slight mistake by the part of these "immature teens" (as Lynch so lovingly calls them) ends in the harsh punishment of digestion... while she explains the industrial revolution, of course. Depending on the teacher's mood, any reason can be enough to earn a place in her belly, so better sit tight, stay silent, and listen... unless you wish to be put in permanent detention.
creator: NomNom88857
